text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho is a competition for the
venerable Spring Shield. Biwa Hayahide looks on
from the stands, listening to positive pre-race
takes on Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian squares off against Mejiro McQueen
and Mihono Bourbon. But no matter who she's up
against, she only seeks to prove her own strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sparks fly between Narita Brian and the other two
racers. Being the one who challenged everyone,
she can't afford to lose.
